title: Kariosid Feather Floor Lamp,59in Simple Modern LED Standing Lamp,White Feather Floor Lamp for Bedroom,Living Room,Dining Room and Office(Bulb not Included)
features: 【Fashionable feather floor lamp】Modern and minimalist design fills your home with style and beautifies the home environment.It is perfect for bedrooms, study rooms,and living rooms,making it the best gift for family and friends.

【Soft lighting】Let the light shine into the room through the feathers,it will make your home more warm and comfortable,even prolonged reading will not hurt your eyes.compatible with a variety of E26 specification light bulbs (this product does not include light bulbs)
【Liberate Your Hands】The use of foot switches can facilitate the elderly and children, allowing them to easily turn on the lights without bending over

【Easy installation and cleaning】Natural feather floor lamp,including detailed installation instructions,easy to install and clean,special feather design, dust-free,non fading,practical and beautiful feather lamp,making your room more designed.

【Artificial Weaving Lampshade】The feather lampshade belongs to artificial weaving.Before installation,take out the lampshade from the bag,you need to shake the lampshade,some feathers will fall out,this is a normal phenomenon,do not have to worry about the quality problem.
description: Product Description Product Name: Modern Feather Floor Lamp Color: White. Lamp shade material: high-quality feather. Light source types: LED bulbs, incandescent lamps, and energy-saving bulbs. Craft: Hand woven feather lampshade. Number of light sources: 1. Lamp holder: E27. Lighting area: 10-15 square meters. Light source: without bulb. Voltage: 220 V. Space: living room, office, bedroom. Style: Simple and modern. Color temperature: Select the bulb with the corresponding color temperature according to your needs. Dimensions: 150 x 40 x 40 cm. Features Foot switch. People can easily turn on the lights without their hands. Feather floor lamp applies to a room lounge or high-end hotel. Elegant and generous look that enhances your taste for your interior. Tips The feathers have been pressed into the need of the packaging. When installing, please gently shake the shade to make its feathers soft naturally. When cleaning, please use a dry cloth to gently tap and remove the dust on the feather. Some feathers fall out is a normal phenomenon, please take care to gently pick up the lampshade from top to bottom Details E27 Base Stable Foundation Soft Feathers
